creator: naito.yuichiro@gmail.com
text:
I updated the bmd to 3.1. See the following URL for the release note.

https://github.com/yuichiro-naito/bmd/releases/tag/3.1

I also updated my patch to upgrade sysutils/bmd port.
Please apply `bmd-3.1.patch` to the Ports tree.
After applying `bmd-3.1.patch`, please apply `bmd-plugin-avahi-3.0.patch` and
`bmd-plugin-hookcmd-3.0.patch`.
